Enhance Artifact Tracking and Summary Design in Index 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a comprehensive design for tracking and summarizing artifacts generated by scheduled tasks in the Aichat2 system. Key changes include the creation of a new MongoDB collection for artifacts, an internal tool for artifact registration, and a dedicated API for displaying artifacts. This enhancement aims to improve visibility and accessibility of generated outputs, making it easier for users to track their tasks.

items.title: Streamline BYOC Authorization Experience in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update resolves an issue where two interfaces appeared during BYOC authorization, causing user confusion. By hiding the installation panel when the BYOC credential dialog is open, we ensure a cleaner user experience with only one visible dialog. Additionally, misleading text on the installation panel has been removed to maintain clarity.

items.title: Enhance README with Multi-Channel Driving Options in Coding Bridge 🚀
items.summary: This update modifies the README to highlight the multi-channel driving capabilities of the Coding Bridge agent, including browser, phone, WeChat, and Telegram. Key changes include an updated tagline and a new section detailing two ways to drive the agent, ensuring users can easily set up their preferred method. The documentation has been thoroughly checked for accuracy, with all links and commands verified.

items.title: Revamp X Connector to Cookie-Based Authentication in Backend 🚀
items.summary: The X connector has been transformed from a key-based OAuth 1.0a system to a cookie-based authentication method, aligning it with existing connectors like Weibo and Medium. Key changes include the removal of password fields, the introduction of required skills for automatic installation, and a new description emphasizing the use of an ACE plugin for login state capture. This update enhances usability for end-users by simplifying the connection process.

items.title: Introducing Cookie-Based X (Twitter) Skill in Skills 🚀
items.summary: This update adds a new cookie-based skill for X (Twitter) that allows users to interact with their accounts without needing API keys. Key features include posting tweets, searching, and reading timelines, all gated by a confirmation step to ensure safety. The implementation uses the `twikit` library to drive interactions, making it easier for users to engage with X directly from the platform.

items.title: Fix cookie/BYOC connector redirect issue in Nexior 🚀
items.summary: This update addresses a critical issue where the cookie/BYOC connector was redirecting to a 404 page after authorization due to a hardcoded return URL. The fix rewrites the return URL to point to the correct conversation route, ensuring a seamless user experience. Additionally, new tests have been added to validate the changes, all of which passed successfully.

items.title: Enhance Bluesky Image Posting Functionality in Skills 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a new CLI script for the Bluesky skill, enabling users to post text and images seamlessly. The script automates the entire posting process, including session creation, image handling, and facet computation, eliminating previous shell-quoting issues. Comprehensive testing confirms that all functionalities work as intended, ensuring a smooth user experience.

items.title: Enhance Download Page with Back Button in Nexior 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a back button to the chrome-less download page, addressing user navigation issues. The button allows users to return to the previous page or home, ensuring a seamless experience across web, iOS, Android, and desktop platforms. The implementation reuses existing localization keys and CSS styles for consistency.

items.title: Enhance Navigation with App Download Link in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update adds an 'App' entry to the top navigation bar of the platform site, linking directly to the download page for desktop and mobile applications. The change improves discoverability for users seeking to download the apps, aligning the platform with the existing Studio interface. Localization updates have been made for multiple languages to ensure accessibility.

items.title: Fix hover zoom scrollbar issue on service cards in Frontend Web 🎨
items.summary: This update addresses a horizontal scrollbar issue that appeared on service cards when hovered over, caused by the global stylesheet settings. By scoping the overflow property to the preview card body, the hover zoom effect now crops correctly without displaying a scrollbar. Additionally, it resolves a skeleton scrollbar flash on refresh, enhancing the overall user experience on the home page and service list.

items.title: Enhance Telegram Skill with Reliable Image Sending in Skills 🚀
items.summary: This update resolves issues with the Telegram skill's image sending functionality by shipping a new helper script, `tg.py`, that ensures reliable file handling across sandbox replicas. The `send-file` command now downloads images to a local temporary file before uploading, improving reliability and consistency. All existing commands remain intact, preserving the skill's functionality while enhancing its robustness.

items.title: Clean Up Dead Refresh Flow in M C Ps 🚀
items.summary: This update removes the obsolete refresh and offline_access flow from 21 per-service MCP servers, ensuring a more streamlined OAuth process. The changes eliminate unreachable code that could lead to confusion and potential issues, while maintaining the integrity of the durable credential system. All relevant tests have passed, confirming no adverse effects on existing client functionality.

items.title: New MCP Connectors for AceDataCloud in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces four new MCP connectors for AceDataCloud, including OpenAI, GLM, Grok, and WebExtractor. These connectors have been added to the connectors.yaml file, allowing users to access these services seamlessly. The OpenAI connector is prioritized at the top of the list, ensuring easy visibility and access for users.

items.title: Enhance Scheduled Tasks with Editable Title Field in Nexior ✏️
items.summary: This update reintroduces an editable task title field in the Scheduled Tasks dialog, allowing users to customize their task names. The new input field is integrated above the prompt input, ensuring a seamless user experience. Existing functionality remains intact, as empty titles will revert to auto-generated names, maintaining backward compatibility.

items.title: Streamline Access Token Management in M C Ps 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a durable, non-expiring platform token for the AceDataCloud connector, eliminating the need for users to re-authorize after each deployment. Key changes include the removal of the refresh token mechanism and the implementation of a new token minting process that ensures seamless access across pod restarts. Comprehensive tests have been added to validate the new functionality and ensure stability.

items.title: Enhance Platform Tokens with Tags and Metadata in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces `tags` and `metadata` fields to the `PlatformToken` model, allowing for better management of tokens. A new `?tag=` filter has been added to the list endpoint, enabling users to retrieve tokens based on specific tags. These changes aim to improve token reuse and reduce the need for re-authorization, enhancing the overall user experience.

items.title: Enhance Multi-Word Search Functionality in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a fan-out search feature for the public documentation search, allowing multi-word queries to return relevant results. The implementation includes a new `tokenize_query()` function to split queries into keywords and a `relevance_score()` function to rank results based on keyword matches. Unit tests have been added to ensure the reliability of the new functionality.

items.title: Update FontAwesome Icons to Latest Version in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update bumps the @fortawesome/free-brands-svg-icons package from version 7.2.0 to 7.3.0. Key changes include improvements and new icons as detailed in the release notes. This ensures our project benefits from the latest features and fixes.
